description: Task entity for the Golden Path template. Demonstrates state machine, agent hints, and full lifecycle.
semantic_description: A task represents a unit of work assigned to a person with a lifecycle from creation through completion to archival. Used for project tracking and team coordination.
lifecycle_description: NEW → in_progress → DONE → archived / (DELETE allowed from NEW only)

description: Comment on a task. Demonstrates child model with REFERENCE field to parent.
semantic_description: A comment attached to a task, containing free-text content and author information. Used for collaboration and discussion threads on tasks.
lifecycle_description: Created → Updated → Deleted (no status machine; immutable author and task reference after creation)

description: Approval request for a task. Demonstrates Agent-BPM integration with multi-level review patterns.
semantic_description: An approval request for a task, demonstrating Agent-BPM integration with multi-level review. Links a task to a designated approver and tracks the decision outcome.
